data.name: 萌妹兽耳娘激情咖啡
data.detailed_description:
故事:

當你醒過來，你發現被帶到一個虛幻世界裡。當地的皇帝命令你立刻開張一間“異國咖啡廳”，讓當地居民們嘗試其他世界的佳肴。在餐館大開張的當天，你遇見一位邪惡的販子和他的兩位女妖奴，每位女子都帶有這動物的茸茸耳朵。你用你原本打算買餐館材料的錢買下兩位女奴的身契。

這兩位女妖現在終於自由來，但是在這個世界裡大部分人都歧視像她們這些半人半動物的妖精，所以她們都沒處可去。於是你收納了她們在你的咖啡廳工作。當你們三個加深你們的感情，你和你的員工將在貓女狗女咖啡廳享受一下絨絨的激情！

特點:
  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • 15個與美女交流的成人劇情。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 幾小時的內容。
  • 所有美女帶有日文語音。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。

Catgirl & Doggirl Cafe是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本制作室 Norn/Miel所創作。 我們在櫻桃吻吻試圖將日本游戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這游戲裡。

data.short_description: 在一個虛幻世界裡，你被命令去開發一間日式餐館。你將你原本用來買材料的錢從一位奴販換來兩位女妖奴。享受一個熱情的貓狗女餐館工作愛情故事。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo

  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible

  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Catgirl & Doggirl Cafe
data.detailed_description:
After waking up in a foreign fantasy world, you are brought before a King who requests you set up an "Otherworldly Cafe" so that his citizens may partake in delicacies from another realm! On the day of the restaurant's grand opening, you encounter a sinister slaver corralling 2 animal-eared girls in the street and you spend the money you were planning to use for ingredients to save the 2 girls instead!

While the two girls are free to do as they please now that they are free, they really don't have anywhere else to go as people treat the demi-humans quite poorly. So you end up offering them jobs at your restaurant. As the three of you work together and deepen your bonds, enjoy a fluffy *tail* of comfy romance between yourself and your adorable coworkers in the Catgirl & Doggirl Cafe!



  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • 15 intimate scenes of the lewd goings-on inside the Catgirl & Doggirl Cafe.
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Main female characters fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections

Catgirl & Doggirl Cafe is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn / Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Reborn in a fantasy world you're chosen to open a Japanese-style family restaurant. Instead of buying ingredients, you spend your money rescuing 2 animal-eared girls from a dastardly slaver! Enjoy a heartwarming *tail* about the blossoming romance in the Catgirl & Doggirl Cafe.
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
